nasb.text: He made darkness His hiding place, His canopy around Him, Darkness of waters, thick clouds of the skies.

esv.text: He made darkness his covering, his canopy around him, thick clouds dark with water.

cnv.text: 他以黑暗作他的隱密處， 他以濃黑的水氣，就是天空的密雲， 作他四周的帷帳。

ccb.text: 祂藏身于黑暗中， 四围以密云作幔幕。

csbs.text: 他以黑暗作他的藏身处， 以众水的黑暗、天空的乌云作他四围的帷幕。
